query: Tokyo Metropolitan Government population 2024 estimate 14 million 2024
answer: The Tokyo Metropolitan Government estimates the population of Tokyo in 2024 to be around 14 million. This figure represents the metropolitan area's population. The estimate is based on recent demographic trends and projections.

results.title: Tokyo's metropolitan area is the largest urban region in the world ...
results.snippet: Tokyo's metropolitan area is the largest urban region in the world, with an estimated ~37.4 million inhabitants in 2024.

results.title: Tokyo Population Estimates 2023-2024 | PDF - Scribd
results.snippet: As of October 1, 2015, the population of Tokyo is estimated to be 13.491 million, or about 11% of Japan's total population.
